prd.oneLiner: Connect survey design, audiences, responses, segment analysis, insights, and follow-up work.
prd.goal: Improve key-survey response rate and achieve 90% or more follow-up completion.
prd.whyNow: Surveys, customer and employee feedback, analysis results, and improvement work are separated, so input rarely turns into visible change.
prd.problem: Surveys, customer and employee feedback, analysis results, and improvement work are separated, so input rarely turns into visible change.
prd.solution: Connect survey design, audiences, responses, segment analysis, insights, and follow-up work.
prd.alternatives: Email, chat, spreadsheets, and manual ledgers
prd.differentiator: Manage intake, processing, and operations data as one connected source of truth.

targets.name: User responding to a survey or submitting feedback
targets.needs: Quickly register needed work and know its status.
targets.pain: Surveys, customer and employee feedback, analysis results, and improvement work are separated, so input rarely turns into visible change.

targets.name: Product, HR, or CX research operations coordinator
targets.needs: Manage priority and history and review operations metrics.
targets.pain: Surveys, customer and employee feedback, analysis results, and improvement work are separated, so input rarely turns into visible change.

scenarios.text: User responding to a survey or submitting feedback completes survey creation, distribution, and feedback submission and checks progress.
Product, HR, or CX research operations coordinator reviews response rate, satisfaction, theme, and follow-up completion reporting.

prd.northStar: Share of operations requests completed on time

kpis.name: On-time processing rate
kpis.target: Improve key-survey response rate and achieve 90% or more follow-up completion.
kpis.method: Monthly aggregation of completion history against target dates

kpis.name: Operations visibility
kpis.method: Share of registered requests connected to operations reporting

inScope: Survey creation, distribution, and feedback submission
Survey, response, segment, and follow-up-status lookup
Audience selection, distribution, response analysis, and follow-up assignment
Response rate, satisfaction, theme, and follow-up completion reporting
nonGoals: Replacing adjacent systems such as accounting or payroll
assumptions: User and organization data are available through company SSO.
Operators manage policy and classification criteria.
risks: Weak initial classification can cause incorrect processing.
Stale source data can reduce operational trust.
openQuestions: What defines urgent processing and approval?
What are the post-completion verification and reopen rules?
constraints: State, owner, and priority changes require audit logs.
